title: Mildly Buttery Tender Ukrainian Galangal Fondue
description: A festive Ukrainian dish featuring galangal paste, served in a fondue pot and perfect for special occasions. This recipe is fodmap-friendly and easy to make.
instructions: Melt the butter in the fondue pot over low heat.
Add the galangal paste and cook, stirring constantly, for 2 minutes.
Add the ricotta cheese and stir until smooth.
Add the sashimi-cut carrots, zucchini, bell peppers, garlic, salt, parsley, dill, and black pepper, and stir until combined.
Increase the heat to medium and cook, stirring constantly, until the vegetables are tender, about 5 minutes.
Remove from heat and serve hot.
Serve the fondue with bread or vegetables for dipping.
Adjust the seasoning as needed, if desired.
Garnish with additional parsley and dill, if desired.
